name: system-design
description: Specification-driven system design with C4/sequence diagrams, class specs, D3 animations, and test plans

tools.name: extract_artifacts
tools.description: Extract mermaid fenced blocks and D3 HTML from .spec.md files to .artifacts/

tools.name: test_artifacts
tools.description: Render mermaid diagrams to PNG and capture D3 animation filmstrip

tools.name: validate_all
tools.description: Run extract + test on all .spec.md files in the project

tools.name: verify_artifact
tools.description: Assert D3 keyframe DOM state matches ANIMATION_VERIFICATION

tools.name: check_artifacts
tools.description: Scan artifact metadata for MISSING/STALE review entries

prompts.name: system_design_base
prompts.description: Persona and general guidelines for specification-driven design

prompts.name: load_spec
prompts.description: Load the project's spec tree into context

prompts.name: generate_sequence_diagram
prompts.description: Generate a Mermaid sequence diagram for the system data flow

prompts.name: generate_architecture_diagram
prompts.description: Generate a Mermaid C4 container/component diagram

prompts.name: generate_class_specification
prompts.description: Produce complete C++ class declarations for every component

prompts.name: generate_manim_animation
prompts.description: Generate a self-contained Python Manim animation script

prompts.name: generate_d3_animation
prompts.description: Generate a self-contained D3.js HTML animation as an executable consistency check

prompts.name: generate_testing_plan
prompts.description: Produce a structured testing plan covering unit, integration, and E2E tests

prompts.name: generate_from_source
prompts.description: Multi-phase bottom-up spec tree generation from source files

prompts.name: revise_technical_specification
prompts.description: Propose structured revisions to the technical specification

prompts.name: split_sub_modules
prompts.description: Break a monolithic spec into sub-modules

prompts.name: combine_sub_modules
prompts.description: Flatten sub-module specs back to a monolithic document

prompts.name: list_sub_modules
prompts.description: List all sub-modules with facade classes and spec paths

prompts.name: load_sub_module_spec
prompts.description: Load a sub-module spec into the active specification's knowledge

prompts.name: generate_sub_module_spec
prompts.description: Generate a .spec.md file for a named sub-module

prompts.name: list_external
prompts.description: List external integration pairs in external/

prompts.name: load_external
prompts.description: Load an external project's spec tree into context

prompts.name: staleness_check
prompts.description: Check for specs with missing or outdated reviews
